name: codewiki
description: Fetch and read Code Wiki docs for GitHub repos

scripts.build: mkdir -p bin && bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --packages=external --outfile=bin/codewiki && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - bin/codewiki > bin/codewiki.tmp && mv bin/codewiki.tmp bin/codewiki && chmod +x bin/codewiki
